[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 90
- Description: Chat UX/UI fixes and deployment self-sufficiency for truesight_autopilot
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/220
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/219
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/218

  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/10
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/9
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/8
  
  Details:
  Chat UX/UI fixes and deployment self-sufficiency for truesight_autopilot.
  
  What changed:
  - **dapp**: Added async message queuing UI to chat.html (PR #220). Fixed pending approval items not being cleared from hamburger menu (PR #219). Added session ID to URL hash for shareable/bookmarkable conversations (PR #218). Fixed tight spacing between "+ New" button and session list (PR #217).
  - **truesight_autopilot**: Made deploy_autopilot auto-detect local vs remote, use local subprocess when on EC2 (PR #13). Added message queue endpoints for non-blocking async sends (PR #12). Wired deploy_autopilot into _run_tool/tool schemas for self-deploy (PR #11). Added SSH deploy tool with paramiko (PR #10). Fixed pending approvals not being removed from hamburger menu (PR #9). Added merge proposal cards when open_fix_pr succeeds (PR #8).
  - Added --workers 2 to uvicorn so fix agent doesn't block chat during long iterations.
  - Switched deployment from rsync to git-based (git pull on EC2) for proper version tracking.
  
  Why: Chat was blocking during fix agent runs. Deploy workflow required manual ssh. No way to queue messages during processing. Session state got corrupted between restarts.
  
  Evidence:
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 150.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
